reference: I am fourteen weeks post-operative. I have been exercising at the gym since the beginning of June, attending weight training classes and yoga classes a few times a week. It has been going well for the most part, although I skipped a few times when I was feeling uncomfortable in my abdominal area. Tonight, I bent over to pick up a ball for my dog, and I felt a pull just above my navel. It scared me. Now I am laying down. Should I be concerned? I am not in pain, but I am worried about using my abdominal muscles right now.
